calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Continued To Dec-11-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Peter H. Liederman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank.
No appearance by defendant Jee Wung Low, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on July 29, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 30, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 15, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jee Wung Low, an individual, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,253.36.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,309.07.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - $458.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $28,020.43.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Continued To Oct-30-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
